description: FIELD 'NEXT PAYMENT DATE' IS NOT CORRECT
FIELD 'NEXT PAYMENT' IS NOT NUMERIC OR LENGTH IS NOT CORRECT
FIELD 'OUTSTANDING PAYMENTS NUMBER' IS NOT NUMERIC OR LENGTH IS NOT CORRECT
fix: The Outstanding Payments Number represents the number of outstanding payments (remaining installments). It will include any overdue installment if known. In some cases, this number could contain an overdue installment even if it was not yet known at the date of data extraction, due to some grace period for the payment. The format of the number should be Integer: no decimal, no comma/s, and no dot/s. And the length of the integer must not be greater than 3 digits. There are 1,185 occurrences for this error, kindly check and correct.

description: FIELD 'OUTSTANDING BALANCE' IS NOT NUMERIC OR LENGTH IS NOT CORRECT
fix: Amount must be a whole number, no comma, no decimal point. It must be rounded off to the nearest peso. The outstanding balance length is up to fifteen (15) digits only.

description: FIELD 'OVERDUEPAYMENTS NUMBER' IS NOT NUMERIC OR LENGTH IS NOT CORRECT
fix: The Overdue Payments Number represents the number of overdue payments including the number of installments for which the SE is certain that the customer/client missed its payment in reference to the contract with the SE (i.e. after also grace period is expired). The format for the value should be whole numbers only (integer without the decimal), no commas and no dot. The length of the Overdue Payments Number should not be greater than 3 digits.

description: FIELD 'OVERDUEPAYMENTS AMOUNT' IS NOT NUMERIC OR LENGTH IS NOT CORRECT
fix: This field represents the overdue balance (amount of overdue installments). It includes any interest or fee accrued on the amount if applied.

description: FIELD 'OVERDUE DAYS' IS NOT CORRECT
fix: The value reported to this field should be consistent with the OverdueDays domain table below. Any other value aside from the ones listed below will not be accepted by the system.

description: FIELD 'GOOD TYPE' IS NOT CORRECT
fix: Good Type Field is asset under the lease contract, which is borrowed by the customer. Please note the value reported should be consistent with "GoodTypeDomain" list

description: FIELD 'GOOD VALUE' IS NOT NUMERIC OR LENGTH IS NOT CORRECT
fix: The format for the value should be whole numbers only (integer without the decimal), no commas and no dot. Max length is 15.

description: FIELD 'NEW/USED CODE' IS NOT CORRECT
fix: The value reported should be consistent with "NewUsedDomain" list

description: FILENAME FORMAT IS NOT VALID (IT SHOULD BE [ProviderCode]_CSDF_[yyyymmddhh24miss].txt)
fix:
The format of the filename of your submission must be <Provider Code>_CSDF_<YYYYMMDDhhmmss>. The format of the file inside the compressed folder (.zip) must also be text (.txt). 
(For example: OT888888_CSDF_20220131153000.txt)

description: 'PROVIDER CODE' SPECIFIED INTO FILENAME IS NOT VALID
fix: The Provider Code in the filename must match the Provider Code assigned to your institution by CIC.

description: 'TIMESTAMP' SPECIFIED INTO FILENAME IS NOT VALID
fix: The format of the timestamp in the filename must be YYYYMMDDhhmmss.

description: ANOTHER FILE WITH THE SAME TIMESTAMP OR MORE RECENT TIMESTAMP HAS BEEN ALREADY ELABORATED
fix: avoid this error, please note that every submitted file must carry a new/unique timestamp in its filename. If the submitted file is a correction/historical file, please make sure that the 'Submission Type' in the Header portion is set to '1'.

description: 'PROVIDER CODE' INSIDE THE FILE IS NOT VALID OR DIFFERENT FROM THE PROVIDER SPECIFIED INTO FILENAME
NUMBER OF FIELDS IS NOT VALID FOR THE SPECIFIED 'RECORD TYPE'
fix: Each record type has a specific number of fields, as listed below. The pipelines in the report represent the fields, which means a missing pipeline is a missing field. Pipelines can be more than the specified but cannot be less. Please double check as well if there are columns that are hidden and unhide it.

description: HEADER IS NOT PRESENT
FOOTER IS NOT PRESENT
fix: Record Types HD (header) and FT (footer) must always be present.

description: FIELD 'VERSION' OR 'SUBMISSION TYPE' IS NOT VALID OR MISSING
CHARACTER SET OF FILE IS NOT UTF-8
CHARACTER SET OF FILE IS NOT UTF-8 OR CHAR NOT UTF-8 IS PRESENT
fix: error occurs if there are special characters (,.-/ etc.) in fields that only accept alphanumeric characters or if the file is not properly converted into UTF8 without BOM before saving it as a text (.txt) file. You may check the detailed result in your FTP folder's Submission/Output for the specific row numbers of records that encountered this error. Please make sure that there are no special characters in the fields like Monthly Payment Amount, Financed Amount, etc. Please make sure as well that you have selected "Convert to UTF-8" in the Encoding tab in Notepad++ before saving your file into text (TXT.)

description: FILENAME FORMAT IS NOT VALID
fix:
The format of the filename of your submission must be <Provider Code>_CSDF_<YYYYMMDDhhmmss>. The format of the file inside the compressed folder (.zip) must also be text (.txt). 
(For example: OT888888_CSDF_20220131153000.txt)

description: MORE THAN ONE HEADER ROW FOUND
'PROVIDER CODE' SPECIFIED INTO FILENAME IS NOT VALID
fix: The Provider Code in the filename must match the Provider Code assigned to your institution by CIC.

description: 'TIMESTAMP' SPECIFIED INTO FILENAME IS NOT VALID
fix: The format of the timestamp in the filename must be YYYYMMDDhhmmss.

'PROVIDER CODE' INSIDE THE FILE IS NOT VALID OR DIFFERENT FROM THE PROVIDER SPECIFIED INTO FILENAME

NUMBER OF FIELDS IS NOT VALID FOR THE SPECIFIED 'RECORD TYPE'
HEADER IS NOT PRESENT
FIELD 'SERVICE CODE' IN THE HEADER RECORD IS NOT CORRECT
FIELD 'VERSION' IS NOT VALID OR MISSING
CHARACTER SET OF FILE IS NOT UTF-8
CHARACTER SET OF FILE IS NOT UTF-8 OR CHAR NOT UTF-8 IS PRESENT
MORE THAN ONE HEADER ROW FOUND
PROVIDER CODE INSIDE THE FILE IS DIFFERENT FROM THE PROVIDER OF THE SELECTED 'ENQUIRY USER'
THE PROVIDER CODE WITHIN THE FILENAME IS NOT CONSISTENT WITH THE SUBMITTING PROVIDER
FIELD 'EVENT DATE' IS NOT CORRECT
FIELD 'EVENT CODE' IS NOT CORRECT
FIELD 'FIRST NAME' IS MANDATORY TO PROVIDE
fix: This field needs to have a value as it is required.
